lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਚੜਿ ਹਾਥੁ ਨ ਬੂਡਈ ਏਕਾ ਨਦਰਿ ਨਿਹਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: keecharr haath na booddee ekaa nadar nihaal |
lines.english: One who sees the One and Only Lord with his eyes - his hands shall not get muddy and dirty.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਉਬਰੇ ਗੁਰੁ ਸਰਵਰੁ ਸਚੀ ਪਾਲਿ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh ubare gur saravar sachee paal |8|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukhs are saved; the Guru has surrounded the ocean with the embankment of Truth. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਨਿ ਮਰੈ ਜਲੁ ਲੋੜਿ ਲਹੁ ਵਿਣੁ ਗੁਰ ਨਿਧਿ ਜਲੁ ਨਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: agan marai jal lorr lahu vin gur nidh jal naeh |
lines.english: If you wish to put out the fire, then look for water; without the Guru, the ocean of water is not found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮਿ ਮਰੈ ਭਰਮਾਈਐ ਜੇ ਲਖ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: janam marai bharamaaeeai je lakh karam kamaeh |
lines.english: You shall continue to wander lost in reincarnation through birth and death, even if you do thousands of other deeds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਅਮਰ ਪਦੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਹਰਿ ਮੇਲੈ ਮੇਲਾਇ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: naanak niramal amar pad gur har melai melaae |9|
lines.english: O Nanak, the immaculate, immortal status is obtained, and the Guru will unite you in the Lord's Union. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮੁ ਜਾਗਾਤਿ ਨ ਲਗਈ ਜੇ ਚਲੈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jam jaagaat na lagee je chalai satigur bhaae |
lines.english: But you shall not be taxed by the Messenger of Death, if you walk in harmony with the Will of the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਰ ਕੇਰੀ ਛਪੜੀ ਕਊਆ ਮਲਿ ਮਲਿ ਨਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kalar keree chhaparree kaooaa mal mal naae |
lines.english: The crow rubs and washes itself in the mud puddle.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਮੈਲਾ ਅਵਗੁਣੀ ਚਿੰਜੁ ਭਰੀ ਗੰਧੀ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: man tan mailaa avagunee chinj bharee gandhee aae |
lines.english: Its mind and body are polluted with its own mistakes and demerits, and its beak is filled with dirt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਵਰੁ ਹੰਸਿ ਨ ਜਾਣਿਆ ਕਾਗ ਕੁਪੰਖੀ ਸੰਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: saravar hans na jaaniaa kaag kupankhee sang |
lines.english: The swan in the pool associated with the crow, not knowing that it was evil.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਕਤ ਸਿਉ ਐਸੀ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਹੈ ਬੂਝਹੁ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਰੰਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: saakat siau aisee preet hai boojhahu giaanee rang |
lines.english: Such is the love of the faithless cynic; understand this, O spiritually wise ones, through love and devotion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਸਭਾ ਜੈਕਾਰੁ ਕਰਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sant sabhaa jaikaar kar guramukh karam kamaau |
lines.english: So proclaim the victory of the Society of the Saints, and act as Gurmukh.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਨੑਾਵਣੁ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਗੁਰੁ ਤੀਰਥੁ ਦਰੀਆਉ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: niramal naavan naanakaa gur teerath dareeaau |10|
lines.english: Immaculate and pure is that cleansing bath, O Nanak, at the sacred shrine of the Guru's river. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮੇ ਕਾ ਫਲੁ ਕਿਆ ਗਣੀ ਜਾਂ ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਨ ਭਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: janame kaa fal kiaa ganee jaan har bhagat na bhaau |
lines.english: What should I account as the rewards of this human life, if one does not feel love and devotion to the Lord?

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੈਧਾ ਖਾਧਾ ਬਾਦਿ ਹੈ ਜਾਂ ਮਨਿ ਦੂਜਾ ਭਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: paidhaa khaadhaa baad hai jaan man doojaa bhaau |
lines.english: Wearing clothes and eating food is useless, if the mind is filled with the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵੇਖਣੁ ਸੁਨਣਾ ਝੂਠੁ ਹੈ ਮੁਖਿ ਝੂਠਾ ਆਲਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: vekhan sunanaa jhootth hai mukh jhootthaa aalaau |
lines.english: Seeing and hearing is false, if one speaks lies.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਲਾਹਿ ਤੂ ਹੋਰੁ ਹਉਮੈ ਆਵਉ ਜਾਉ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: naanak naam salaeh too hor haumai aavau jaau |11|
lines.english: O Nanak, praise the Naam, the Name of the Lord; everything else is coming and going in egotism. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੈਨਿ ਵਿਰਲੇ ਨਾਹੀ ਘਣੇ ਫੈਲ ਫਕੜੁ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: hain virale naahee ghane fail fakarr sansaar |12|
lines.english: The Saints are few and far between; everything else in the world is just a pompous show. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਲਗੀ ਤੁਰਿ ਮਰੈ ਜੀਵਣ ਨਾਹੀ ਤਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: naanak lagee tur marai jeevan naahee taan |
lines.english: O Nanak, one who is struck by the Lord dies instantaneously; the power to live is lost.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰਮ ਪੈਕਾਮੁ ਨ ਨਿਕਲੈ ਲਾਇਆ ਤਿਨਿ ਸੁਜਾਣਿ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: piram paikaam na nikalai laaeaa tin sujaan |13|
lines.english: The arrow of love, shot by the All-knowing Lord, cannot be pulled out. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੋਟੈ ਸੇਤੀ ਜੋ ਮਰੈ ਲਗੀ ਸਾ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: chottai setee jo marai lagee saa paravaan |
lines.english: If someone dies by such a stroke, then he is accepted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਲਾਏ ਤਿਸੁ ਲਗੈ ਲਗੀ ਤਾ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: jis no laae tis lagai lagee taa paravaan |
lines.english: He alone is struck, who is struck by the Lord; after such a stroke, he is approved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਂਡਾ ਧੋਵੈ ਕਉਣੁ ਜਿ ਕਚਾ ਸਾਜਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: bhaanddaa dhovai kaun ji kachaa saajiaa |
lines.english: Who can wash the unbaked clay pot?

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਾਤੂ ਪੰਜਿ ਰਲਾਇ ਕੂੜਾ ਪਾਜਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: dhaatoo panj ralaae koorraa paajiaa |
lines.english: Joining the five elements together, the Lord made a false cover.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਂਡਾ ਆਣਗੁ ਰਾਸਿ ਜਾਂ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: bhaanddaa aanag raas jaan tis bhaavasee |
lines.english: When it pleases Him, He makes it right.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਮ ਜੋਤਿ ਜਾਗਾਇ ਵਾਜਾ ਵਾਵਸੀ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: param jot jaagaae vaajaa vaavasee |14|
lines.english: The supreme light shines forth, and the celestial song vibrates and resounds. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਹੁ ਜਿ ਅੰਧੇ ਘੂਪ ਕਹਿਆ ਬਿਰਦੁ ਨ ਜਾਣਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: manahu ji andhe ghoop kahiaa birad na jaananee |
lines.english: Those who are totally blind in their minds, do not have the integrity to keep their word.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਅੰਧੈ ਊਂਧੈ ਕਵਲ ਦਿਸਨਿ ਖਰੇ ਕਰੂਪ ॥
lines.translit: man andhai aoondhai kaval disan khare karoop |
lines.english: With their blind minds, and their upside-down heart-lotus, they look totally ugly.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਨਾ ਨਾਦੁ ਨ ਬੇਦੁ ਨ ਗੀਅ ਰਸੁ ਰਸੁ ਕਸੁ ਨ ਜਾਣੰਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: eikanaa naad na bed na geea ras ras kas na jaanant |
lines.english: Some do not know the Sound-current of the Naad, spiritual wisdom or the joy of song. They do not even understand good and bad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਕਹਿ ਜਾਣਨਿ ਕਹਿਆ ਬੁਝਨਿ ਤੇ ਨਰ ਸੁਘੜ ਸਰੂਪ ॥
lines.translit: eik keh jaanan kahiaa bujhan te nar sugharr saroop |
lines.english: Some know how to speak and understand what they are told. Those people are wise and good-looking.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਨਾ ਸਿਧਿ ਨ ਬੁਧਿ ਨ ਅਕਲਿ ਸਰ ਅਖਰ ਕਾ ਭੇਉ ਨ ਲਹੰਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: eikanaa sidh na budh na akal sar akhar kaa bheo na lahant |
lines.english: Some have no idea of perfection, wisdom or understanding; they know nothing about the mystery of the Word.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤੇ ਨਰ ਅਸਲਿ ਖਰ ਜਿ ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਣ ਗਰਬੁ ਕਰੰਤ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: naanak te nar asal khar ji bin gun garab karant |15|
lines.english: O Nanak, those people are really donkeys; they have no virtue or merit, but still, they are very proud. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੀਲ ਸੰਤੋਖ ਕਾ ਰਖੈ ਧਰਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: seel santokh kaa rakhai dharam |
lines.english: He keeps to the Dharma, with faith, humility and contentment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪੁ ਤਪੁ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਕਮਾਵੈ ਕਰਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: jap tap sanjam kamaavai karam |
lines.english: He chants and meditates, and practices austerity and good deeds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਬ੍ਰਹਮਣੁ ਜੋ ਬਿੰਦੈ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: so brahaman jo bindai braham |
lines.english: He alone is a Brahmin, who knows God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਬ੍ਰਹਮਣੁ ਪੂਜਣ ਜੁਗਤੁ ॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: soee brahaman poojan jugat |16|
lines.english: Such a Brahmin is worthy of being worshipped. ||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਤ੍ਰੀ ਸੋ ਜੁ ਕਰਮਾ ਕਾ ਸੂਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: khatree so ju karamaa kaa soor |
lines.english: He alone is a Kh'shaatriyaa, who is a hero in good deeds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੰਧਨ ਤੋੜੈ ਹੋਵੈ ਮੁਕਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: bandhan torrai hovai mukat |
lines.english: Breaking his bonds, he is liberated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਬੁ ਲੋਭੁ ਜੇ ਕੂੜੁ ਕਮਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: lab lobh je koorr kamaavai |
lines.english: Whoever practices greed, possessiveness and falsehood,

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੇਤੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ਬੀਜੈ ਦਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: khet pachhaanai beejai daan |
lines.english: he understands his farm, and plants the seeds of generosity.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਖਤ੍ਰੀ ਦਰਗਹ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: so khatree daragah paravaan |
lines.english: Such a Kh'shaatriyaa is accepted in the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁੰਨ ਦਾਨ ਕਾ ਕਰੈ ਸਰੀਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: pun daan kaa karai sareer |
lines.english: He uses his body to give in charity;

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਣਾ ਕੀਤਾ ਆਪੇ ਪਾਵੈ ॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: apanaa keetaa aape paavai |17|
lines.english: shall receive the fruits of his own labors. ||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਨ ਤਪਾਇ ਤਨੂਰ ਜਿਉ ਬਾਲਣੁ ਹਡ ਨ ਬਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: tan na tapaae tanoor jiau baalan hadd na baal |
lines.english: Do not heat your body like a furnace, or burn your bones like firewood.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰਿ ਪੈਰੀ ਕਿਆ ਫੇੜਿਆ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਪਿਰੀ ਸਮੑਾਲਿ ॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: sir pairee kiaa ferriaa andar piree samaal |18|
lines.english: What have your head and feet done wrong? See your Husband Lord within yourself. ||18||
